questions.question: What does Paul command regarding those who are idle?
questions.feedback: Paul commands them to keep away from any brother walking in idleness.

questions.question: What rule did Paul give about those who will not work?
questions.feedback: If anyone is not willing to work, let him not eat.

questions.question: Paul says the Lord is faithful and will guard believers against the evil one.
questions.feedback: The Lord is faithful and will establish and guard them against the evil one.

questions.question: Paul says do not grow _____ in doing good.
questions.feedback: Do not grow weary in doing good.

questions.question: Paul says if anyone does not obey his instruction, do not regard him as an enemy but warn him as a _____.
questions.feedback: Warn the disobedient as a brother, not as an enemy.
